report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides — Crypto Wallet Security (token approvals, wallet drainers, protection) and Restaking Protocol Comparison (EigenLayer vs Symbiotic vs Karak) — with full SEO metadata, FAQs, and internal linking; added both to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Wallet drainer attacks caused $3.1B in losses in H1 2025; signature phishing jumped 207% in Jan 2026 vs Dec 2025
42% of phishing losses traced to drainer scripts on fake airdrop sites; average theft time under 32 seconds
FBI issued alert March 19, 2026 about fake FBI Token TRC-20 airdrop scam on Tron
Restaking market reached $16.3B TVL across 3 protocols: EigenLayer ($15.3B, 93.9%), Symbiotic ($897M, 5.5%), Karak ($102M, 0.6%)
EigenLayer dominates with 4.36M ETH committed; Symbiotic backed by Paradigm/Lido co-founders offers modular architecture
Karak differentiates with multi-asset restaking (LP tokens, stablecoins, WBTC) and cross-chain plans
Gap analysis confirmed: no existing pages on token approval security or restaking protocol comparisons

sections.title: Content Created
items: Crypto Wallet Security guide: 12-min read covering token approvals, wallet drainers, attack vectors, Revoke.cash usage, security practices, and recovery steps — ~2,500 words
Restaking Comparison guide: 14-min read with deep dives on EigenLayer, Symbiotic, and Karak, HTML comparison table, slashing mechanics, and protocol selection framework — ~2,800 words

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Page 1 title: 'Crypto Wallet Security: Token Approvals & Wallet Drainer Protection (2026) | degen0x'
Page 2 title: 'Restaking Comparison 2026: EigenLayer vs Symbiotic vs Karak | degen0x'
Both pages include structured FAQ data for FAQ rich snippets
Internal linking to 8 existing pages across both guides
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts
